items.title_en: Trump keeps turning Republican wins into loyalty tests — and political liabilities
items.title_zh: 特朗普不断将共和党的胜利变成忠诚度测试和政治责任
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump’s moves on housing, FISA, Iran and Washington projects are creating new headaches for Republicans trying to show voters they can govern.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在住房、外国情报监视法案、伊朗和华盛顿项目方面的举措给试图向选民展示他们可以治理的共和党人带来了新的麻烦。

items.title_en: Ariel’s John Rogers likes these small-cap names as the market rally broadens
items.title_zh: 随着市场反弹扩大，阿里尔的约翰·罗杰斯喜欢这些小盘股
items.desc_en: Ariel Investments' John Rogers highlighted for-profit education company Covista as a small-cap stock he's currently bullish on.
items.desc_zh: Ariel Investments 的约翰·罗杰斯 (John Rogers) 强调，营利性教育公司 Covista 是他目前看好的小盘股。

items.title_en: Nasdaq falls for a fourth day as a drop in Apple overshadows Micron's booming earnings: Live updates
items.title_zh: 纳斯达克连续第四天下跌，苹果股价下跌盖过了美光科技蓬勃发展的盈利：实时更新
items.desc_en: The Nasdaq Composite fell on Thursday, even after a blowout Micron Technology earnings report, as traders moved out of key technology stocks.
items.desc_zh: 尽管美光科技公布了井喷的盈利报告，但纳斯达克综合指数周四仍下跌，因为交易员纷纷抛售关键科技股。

items.title_en: Small caps are booming this year. Here are Wall Street's top smaller picks
items.title_zh: 小盘股今年蓬勃发展。以下是华尔街精选的小型股票
items.desc_en: Small cap stocks are on pace to notch their best first half of the year since 1991, and TD Cowen and Bank of America have ideas about how to play the trend.
items.desc_zh: 小盘股有望创下自 1991 年以来最好的上半年表现，TD Cowen 和美国银行对于如何应对这一趋势有自己的想法。

items.desc_zh: 在他的家乡接受 CNBC 现场采访时，这位政策制定者拒绝猜测他认为利率的走向。

items.title_zh: 奢侈品消费现在由体验和“遗产旅游”驱动

items.desc_zh: 一份新报告显示，虽然奢侈品销售额预计将增长 1% 至 4%，但体验今年的增长有望在 3% 至 7% 之间。

items.desc_zh: 自从伊朗通过有效关闭霍尔木兹海峡来回应美国和以色列的袭击以来，能源价格一直在疯狂上涨。

items.title_en: Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities
items.title_zh: Anthropic 指责中国竞争对手阿里巴巴非法提取人工智能能力
items.desc_en: The firm alleged that Alibaba used fraudulent accounts to access data from its Claude AI model.
items.desc_zh: 该公司声称阿里巴巴使用欺诈账户来访问其 Claude AI 模型的数据。

items.title_en: Independent MPs launch new Australian centrist party
items.title_zh: 独立议员成立新的澳大利亚中间派政党
items.desc_en: Zali Steggall and Allegra Spender say Community Strong Australia will offer citizens 'reason over rage'.
items.desc_zh: 扎利·斯蒂格尔（Zali Steggall）和阿莱格拉·斯彭德（Allegra Spender）表示，“社区强大澳大利亚”将为公民提供“理性战胜愤怒”的机会。

items.title_en: Trump asks Congress for $87bn, mostly for 'urgent' Iran war costs
items.title_zh: 特朗普向国会请求 870 亿美元，主要用于“紧急”的伊朗战争费用
items.desc_en: But the budget faces an uphill battle, coming a day after lawmakers rebuked Trump's military action.
items.desc_zh: 但在立法者谴责特朗普的军事行动的第二天，预算面临着一场艰苦的战斗。

items.title_en: Philippines bans video game played by alleged high school shooter
items.title_zh: 菲律宾禁止涉嫌高中射手玩的电子游戏
items.desc_en: The rare school shooting that left three students killed and 20 others injured has shocked the country.
items.desc_zh: 罕见的校园枪击事件导致3名学生死亡、20人受伤，震惊全国。

items.title_en: Espaillat's loss shakes up House Democrats, Hispanic caucus - CBS News
items.title_zh: 埃斯佩拉特的失败震动了众议院民主党和西班牙裔核心小组 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻
items.desc_en: Espaillat's loss shakes up House Democrats, Hispanic caucus  CBS NewsProgressive New Yorker backed by Zohran Mamdani for US Congress targets ‘establishment’  The GuardianWho Is Darializa Avila Chevali
items.desc_zh: 埃斯佩拉特的失败震撼了众议院民主党人和西班牙裔核心小组  哥伦比亚广播公司新闻进步纽约客在佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 的支持下支持美国国会，目标是“建制派”  卫报谁是 Darializa Avila Chevali

items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: How 100 hospitals switched to pen and paper to defeat a national cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.desc_zh: 水分追踪设备充斥市场，但信息量是否太多？

items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。
